data.body: WS-B/WS-C/WS-E stories DONE (12 commits). Engine runs scripted workflows end-to-end (lib/CLI/MCP). Starting WS-H: COMMITS event type (mirrors C1 plumbing): union-add by sha, lazy/additive state.commits, KNOWN+EVENT_TYPES, processor+dispatch, compaction-safe, HLC+UUID convergent; library writer rebar.attach_commits; NOT a Jira-synced field (field-driven outbound differ unaffected). Makes fetch_commits real; needed by WS-K.
